s: View and edit CSV files on your Android device
d:
CSV Editor is a simple, lightweight app for viewing and editing CSV (comma-separated values) files on your Android device.

Features:
• Open CSV files from your device storage
• Create new CSV files from scratch
• Edit individual cells in a spreadsheet-like view
• Add and delete rows and columns
• Save edited files back to storage
• Horizontal and vertical scrolling for large files
• Pinch to zoom for better viewing
• Keyboard-aware scrolling keeps your active cell visible

CSV Editor is free and open source software with no ads or tracking.
